data.title: Energy experts slam ‘deeply flawed’ Harvard-led study on Bitcoin mining’s environmental impact
data.description:
The recent study argued Bitcoin mining in the U. S. significantly contributes to cross-state air pollution, impacting 1. 9 million Americans.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/351142/energy-experts-flawed-harvard-study-bitcoin-mining?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: The European Central Bank cut interest rates by 25 basis points as expected
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The European Central Bank cut the deposit facility rate by 25 basis points to 2.25%, in line with market expectations, marking the sixth consecutive meeting to cut interest rates. The main refinancing rate and marginal lending rate were lowered from 2.65% and 2.9% to 2.4% and 2.65% respectively. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid to increase its HYPE holdings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid to increase its holdings of HYPE. In the past five days, the whale deposited 7.99 million USDC into Hyperliquid. It has spent 5.99 million US dollars to purchase 376,442 HYPE at a price of 15.9 US dollars, making a profit of 266,000 US dollars.

data.title: "2015 IC0 76,000 ETH Whale" suspected of selling 3,000 ETH 45 minutes ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, “the giant whale with 76,000 $ETH in IC0 in 2015” and “the giant whale with 76,000 $ETH in ICO in 2015” woke up again after three years of slumber. 45 minutes ago, it was suspected of selling 3,000 ETH (4.78 million US dollars) at a cost as low as 0.31 US dollars. An hour ago, the giant whale transferred 6,000 ETH to the new address, worth 9.55 million US dollars, and it is expected to sell all of it in the near future.

data.title: Lombard Finance launches software development kit to support BTC staking services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin infrastructure developer Lombard Finance has launched a software development kit (SDK) that allows wallets, exchanges, and other platforms to provide one-click Bitcoin (BTC) staking services. The toolkit allows users to stake BTC to mint a liquid staking token called LBTC, and allows automatic deposits into Lombard's DeFi Vault, which currently has an annual yield of 3%. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Crypto Exchange Upbit Triggers Explosive Rally for Wallet-Focused Altcoin After Adding Support
data.description:
The South Korean crypto exchange Upbit has announced a new listing for a wallet-focused altcoin, triggering explosive price action. According to a new announcement, Upbit is supporting Wallet Connect (WCT) for trading over the Optimism (OP) network on its platform starting Wednesday.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/17/crypto-exchange-upbit-triggers-explosive-rally-for-wallet-focused-altcoin-after-adding-support/

data.title: Altcoin Season Delayed? Gensler Says Only Bitcoin Will Survive the Test of Time
data.description:
Bitcoin went up slightly to $84,312, and Ethereum also gained a bit to $1,596. The overall crypto market cap rose just a little to $2. 64 trillion
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/altcoin-season-delayed-gensler-says-only-bitcoin-will-survive-the-test-of-time/

data.title: New Galaxy Ventures Fund to Invest in Stablecoins and Payments Startups
data.description:
TL;DR Fundraising Milestone: Galaxy Ventures Fund I LP shattered its initial $150 million target and is now set to top between $175 million and $180 million by the end of June, defying current market headwinds. Strategic Focus: The fund is dedicated to building a diversified portfolio of 30 crypto and blockchain startups, with a strong. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/new-galaxy-ventures-fund-to-invest-in-stablecoins-and-payments-startups/

data.title: Charles Schwab Reports Better than Expected Results for Q1 2025
data.description:
Charles Schwab Corporation's first-quarter results outperformed market expectations, showcasing significant growth in revenue and earnings.
source: https://tokenist.com/charles-schwab-reports-better-than-expected-results-for-q1-2025/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=charles-schwab-reports-better-than-expected-results-for-q1-2025

data.title: BNB Chain TVL Incentive Program #5 has ended, and 5 projects have received delegated support
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BNB Chain TVL Incentive Plan #5 has ended, and 5 projects have received delegated support, namely: KERNELDAO, ASTHERUS, YIELDNEST, TRANCHESS and LISTA-DAO.
